title: Genbank Accession Numbers of Seven snail species hidden in one: Biogeographic diversity in an apparently widespread periwinkle in the Southern Ocean
author: González-Wevar, Claudio A.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains GenBank accession numbers for 45 cytochrome c oxidase subunit I (COI) genes and 94 large subunit ribosomal RNA (28S rRNA) genes obtained from periwinkle snail species  Laevilitorina caliginosa ,  Laevilacunaria antarctica ,  Laevilitorina umbilicata , and  Laevilitorina claviformis
steps_raw: This dataset contains GenBank accession numbers for 45 cytochrome c oxidase subunit I (COI) genes and 94 large subunit ribosomal RNA (28S rRNA) genes obtained from periwinkle snail species  Laevilitorina caliginosa ,  Laevilacunaria antarctica ,  Laevilitorina umbilicata , and  Laevilitorina claviformis
